name: Industrial Safety Helmets
description: High-quality industrial safety helmets with shock absorption, adjustable headband, and ventilation for maximum protection and comfort.

name: Safety Goggles & Eyewear
description: Impact-resistant safety goggles and eyewear providing protection against dust, debris, chemicals, and UV radiation.

name: Ear Protection
description: Noise-reducing earplugs and earmuffs designed for high-noise industrial environments to prevent hearing damage.

name: High-Visibility Safety Vests
description: Reflective high-visibility vests meeting safety standards for construction sites, warehouses, and road work.

name: Nitrile Gloves
description: Chemical-resistant nitrile gloves suitable for laboratory, industrial, and medical applications.

name: Leather Work Gloves
description: Premium leather work gloves providing heat resistance, cut protection, and superior grip for heavy-duty tasks.

name: Insulated Rubber Gloves
description: Electrically insulated rubber gloves for safe handling of electrical equipment and live wires.

name: Steel Toe Safety Boots
description: Industrial-grade steel toe boots with slip-resistant soles, puncture protection, and waterproof construction.

name: Anti-Static Safety Shoes
description: Anti-static footwear for electronics manufacturing and environments requiring electrostatic discharge protection.

name: Fire Extinguishers
description: Multi-purpose fire extinguishers including ABC dry powder, CO2, and foam types for various fire hazards.

name: First Aid Kits
description: Comprehensive first aid kits stocked with essential medical supplies for workplace emergency response.

name: Fall Protection Harness
description: Full-body fall protection harnesses with shock-absorbing lanyards for working at heights safely.
